description: Pi Adapter selection config — switch adapters without code changes

inference.description: Inference backend for single-turn model calls (streamSimple/completeSimple)

mock.description: Deterministic mock for unit testing (same class, runtime context decides which script to use)

agentRuntime.description: Agent runtime backend for full agent execution runs

switching.runtime: To switch at runtime, read this config in the bootstrap phase and instantiate the selected adapter class: const AdapterClass = (await import(config.adapterConfig.inference.available[active].package))[className]
switching.config: To change the active adapter, edit the 'active' field in this file and restart. No code changes needed.
